relationships: ber:Tom yerzef ɣer Ustṛalya akken ad iẓer kra seg yiqriben-is
ber:S kra n tuccḍa tamecṭuḥt ara teg Rima, ad as-tt-id-yaf Ziri d tamentilt akken ad tt-yennaɣ
ber:S kra n tuccḍa tamecṭuḥt ara teg Rima, ad as-tt-id-yaf Ziri d tamentilt akken ad tt-yezzem
ber:Tom iḥemmel ad d-yernu seg ddemma-nnes mi ara yessawal ɣef kra
ber:Yella ccek d ameqran dakken Tom atan deg kra n usafag
ber:Sami yebda yeggar tamawt i kra n tɣawsiwin yeffɣen i leεwayed
ber:Yella ccek d ameqqran dakken Sami iga kra n tɣawsa n diri
ber:Ulac ccekk dakken yella kra ay la ssefrayen ad t-gen
ber:Ulac ccekk dakken yella kra ay la ssefrayent ad t-gent
ber:Sami ur yessaweḍ ara ad yexdem s kra n wayen i yewεed ad t-yexdem
ber:Iyya ad nelmed kra n wawalen imaziɣen yettwassexdamen deg tuttriwin
ber:Sami ur yelli ara yettwali yella kra n ugmuḍ i d-yellan
ber:Ulac ccekk dakken yella kra ay la d-ttheyyint ad t-gent
ber:Ziri yeqqim kra yekka wass netta yettḍafar Rima
ber:Qrib s kra n win ay ssneɣ yesɛa tasnasɣalt
ber:Qrib s kra n win ay ssneɣ ila tasnasɣalt
ber:Yanni yella qrib kra yekka wass netta yecɣel
ber:Cikkeɣ ass-a ad d-iwet unẓar kra yekka wass
ber:Yanni yeqqim kra yekka wass netta ixeddem aya
ber:Iyya ad nelmed kra n wawalen imaziɣen ass-a
